description_long: This rifle features a modern, tactical design with a matte olive-green and black color scheme. The body is angular and streamlined, with a prominent detachable box magazine and a thumbhole stock for ergonomic handling. The upper receiver is equipped with a compact red dot sight, and the barrel is short with a small flash hider at the muzzle. The handguard has a ribbed texture, likely for improved grip and heat dissipation, and the trigger guard is integrated into the lower receiver. The overall construction suggests a lightweight, polymer-metal hybrid build suitable for urban environments.
description: A modern, olive-green and black tactical rifle with a thumbhole stock, red dot sight, and detachable box magazine.
description_view_0: Front view showing the narrow barrel, flash hider, and the alignment of the sight system.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thumbhole stock, detachable box magazine, ribbed handguard, and red dot sight.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the stock's structure and the sight alignment.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the same features as view 1, with more detail on the magazine and handguard.
